name: Air Marine SA
summary: Air Marine SA engages in the provision of air services through drones and aircraft for public and private accounts in France. It covers various air missions comprising topography, linear monitoring, structure inspection, solar panel inspection, zone surveillance, intrusion detection, target tracking, target towing, and plastering missions, as well as maps soils and establishes recommendations for modulation of nitrogen using captures from drones or aircraft. The company was founded in 1991 and is based in L√É¬©ognan, France.
